case_title: MARTIN KASSMAN VS. ERICA L. BRACHFELD, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KASSMAN, MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERICA L. BRACHFELD, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,045.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
